entities.summary: Model configuration dataclass holding architecture hyperparameters

detail.name: Config
detail.description: Stores num_layers, hidden_size, num_heads, vocab_size etc. Loaded from HuggingFace config.json.

teaches.explain: @dataclass holding all hyperparameters. Single source of truth. Loaded from JSON/YAML. Passed to all components that need config.
Architecture defined by data (config.json), not hard-coded. Same code runs different model sizes by changing config.
